title: Coal burning into diamond
description: This is a lightweight survival aid mod,This mod allows you to make coal blocks burn into diamonds!
body:
This is a lightweight survival aid mod,This mod allows you to make coal blocks burn into diamonds!
You can also use diamonds as fuel!(Version 2.0.0 or later)

The mod can be installed on the server, and you can use the mod on the server.This mod is compatible with mods related to furnaces, such as the "BetterFurnacesReforged" mod.

Fabric:Fabric api Required
Quilt:Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL) Required
